---
title: "About"
---

# About This Website

This website was created as part of my data science learning journey using Quarto.

The purpose of this website is to showcase my understanding of:
- Data visualization using dashboards
- Interactive applications using Shiny
- Web publishing using Quarto

Through this project, I learned how to organize content, create interactive visuals, and publish a professional-looking website.

This website demonstrates my ability to communicate data insights effectively to an audience.
